title: Choose how you want to practice today
subtitle: The dashboard focuses on three core flows: start a simulated interview, ask the chatbot when you need quick preparation, or review feedback to improve your answers.

interview.label: Interview
interview.title: Interview
interview.description: Start a simulated AI interview based on your IT role and experience level.

chatbot.label: Chatbot
chatbot.title: Chatbot
chatbot.description: Talk with the AI assistant to review technical questions, behavioral questions, and answer structure.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Review comments, strengths, and improvement areas from your previous practice sessions.
